Home / Services / SEO Services / Local SEO

📍 Local SEO

Dominate your local area and show up when nearby customers search for your services. We fully optimise your Google Business Profile with compelling descriptions, proper categories, photos, and posts. Then we build consistent NAP citations across the top local directories, develop a review acquisition strategy to boost your star rating, and create locally-targeted content for your website. If you serve customers in a specific area, local SEO is the fastest path to more phone calls, footfall, and enquiries from people ready to buy.

Service Details

Category: SEO Services

Credits Price: 240 credits (approx. £300)

Turnaround: 5–8 days

How to Book

  1. Create a free account
  2. Purchase credits or subscribe to a plan
  3. Select this service and submit your brief
  4. Receive your completed project within 5–8 days
Book Local SEO Now

Related SEO Services Services

  • On-Page SEO — Comprehensive on-page SEO optimization including meta tags, content structure, and internal linking. (240 credits)
  • Technical SEO — Deep technical audit and fixes including site speed, crawlability, indexing, and Core Web Vitals. (320 credits)
  • Blog SEO — SEO-optimized blog content strategy with keyword research, content briefs, and publishing schedule. (200 credits)

Why Choose Creative Kaygency for Local SEO?

  • Professional quality at credit-friendly prices
  • Fast turnaround: 5–8 days
  • Satisfaction guarantee with included revisions
  • Track progress from your personal dashboard
  • Save up to 20% by paying with credits
